description: Seminar refund rule is supported, but the answer cites an unrelated housing policy page.
query: When can students drop a seminar for a full refund?

retrieved_chunks.text: Students may drop a seminar for a full refund within 7 calendar days of the term start date.
Residence hall cancellation fees are waived only when the student withdraws before key collection.

final_answer: Students may drop a seminar for a full refund within 7 calendar days of the term start date.

entries.text: Students may drop a seminar for a full refund within 7 calendar days of the term start date.
